articles.title: Tons of aid flows into Cuba as humanitarian convoy arrives on the struggling island - AP News
articles.description: Some 650 delegates from 33 countries and 120 organizations have started arriving in Cuba as part of a solidarity caravan transporting some 20 tons of humanitarian aid as the island grapples with a severe energy crisis. Members of “Our America Convoy to Cuba” …
articles.content: HAVANA (AP) Some 650 delegates from 33 countries and 120 organizations began arriving in Cuba on Friday as part of a solidarity caravan transporting some 20 tons of humanitarian aid as the island gra… [+3671 chars]

articles.title: Sylvester Stallone, Jean-Claude Van Damme, More Pay Tribute to Chuck Norris: 'An American Hero' - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Sylvester Stallone, Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dolph Lundgren and more have paid tribute to Chuck Norris, who died Thursday at age 86.
articles.content:
Some of Hollywood’s biggest stars in the action blockbuster world are paying their respects to Chuck Norris, the actor and onetime martial arts champion who died Thursday.
